judge_reason: Description B provides extensive specific quoted text and visual details (FBI label, barcodes, stamps, handwritten annotations) not present in the generic Description A, creating a contradiction in the level of visual content described.
original_image_tags: Color photograph of a tan manila file folder, slightly worn, lying flat. The folder has several labels and handwritten markings.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Photograph of a tan FBI Central Records Center file folder cover with two white barcode labels, large stamped text “DO NOT DESTROY,” a blue declassification sticker, and handwritten red/black file numbers.*
